title: Mechanized Assault Flyer

The '''Mechanized Assault Flyer (MAF)''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]], multi-purpose [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:MechanizedAssaultFlyerViews-Battlefront.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Multiple views of a Mechanized Assault Flyer]]
The Mechanized Assault Flyer was used for several purposes, including close-range bombardment and aerial reconnaissance. It was equipped with two [[Composite-beam laser|beam cannons]] and a rear swiveling [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] that spun around the large disc-like posterior of the ship,<ref name="BFI guide" /> as well as two more laser cannons in side-pods.<ref name="BFI" /> The MAF had one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], a co-pilot, and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] for the turret. It was 18.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and could reach speeds of up to 820 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]].<ref name="BFI guide" />

==History==
The MAF was produced by [[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]],<ref name="BFI guide" /> and was the predecessor to the similarly shaped [[HMP droid gunship/Legends|Heavy Missile Platform]] which was manufactured by [[Baktoid Fleet Ordnance/Legends|Baktoid Fleet Ordnance]] later in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BFII">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> The MAF was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="BFI" />

==Behind the scenes==
The MAF appears in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' during certain multiplayer matches and on certain maps (including Bespin and Kashyyyk).

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' {{1st}}
